title: corycium rubiginosum
intro: Corycium rubiginosum, also known as the rusty club moss, is a small, perennial plant belonging to the class Lycopodiopsida, characterized by its club-shaped spore-bearing structures. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Corycium rubiginosum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are consumed for their medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
